overview: Mistral Large 2.1 (24.11) is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Mistral Large line. Released 2024-11-18. Mistral's frontier flagship line for general-purpose chat, reasoning and coding.
What's notable in this version: 123B dense refresh of Large 2 with better long-context, function calling and system-prompt handling (mistral-large-2411).
